Bluetooth Low Energy Module_V2.3

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAABF2
Recv ID: 18DAF2AB
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: AB
Func Name: BLE VK

  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "6EF190",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "2EF1900000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "name": "DataWrite.VIN",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "VIN": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  }
]
